creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat May 25 08:14:12 2013
New Revision: 319034
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/319034

Log:
  - Remove outdated PERL_LEVEL check
  - Cleanup Makefile header
  - While I'm here, add LICENSE
  
  PR:		ports/178920
  Submitted by:	az

Modified:
  head/databases/p5-BSON/Makefile   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/databases/p5-BSON/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/p5-BSON/Makefile	Sat May 25 08:13:20 2013	(r319033)
+++ head/databases/p5-BSON/Makefile	Sat May 25 08:14:12 2013	(r319034)
@@ -1,9 +1,5 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-BSON
-# Date created:		2011-08-03
-# Whom:			Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh <sunpoet@FreeBSD.org>
-#
+# Created by: Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh <sunpoet@FreeBSD.org>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	BSON
 PORTVERSION=	0.11
@@ -15,11 +11,12 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Pure Perl implementation of MongoDB BSON serialization
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Math-Int64>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/p5-Math-Int64 \
 		p5-Tie-IxHash>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Tie-IxHash
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Math-Int64>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/p5-Math-Int64 \
-		p5-Tie-IxHash>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Tie-IxHash
-
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 TEST_DEPENDS=	p5-DateTime>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-DateTime \
 		p5-Test-Deep>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Deep \
 		p5-Test-Exception>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Exception
@@ -37,10 +34,4 @@ MAN3=		BSON.3 \
 		BSON::Time.3 \
 		BSON::Timestamp.3
 
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
-
-.if ${PERL_LEVEL} < 501200
-TEST_DEPENDS+=	p5-Test-Simple>=0.94:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Simple
-.endif
-
-.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.mk>
